basics.name: Lokesh Anand
basics.label: B.Tech, Electronics and Communication Engineering
basics.summary: Undergraduate researcher and builder focused on intelligent sensing systems, embedded AI, and machine learning for physical systems. Experienced in developing end-to-end cyber-physical solutions integrating signal processing, ML inference, and hardware actuation, along with deploying real-world systems involving web platforms, automation workflows, and user-facing applications.

highlights: Built and deployed the company website from scratch, managing end-to-end setup including domain, hosting, and configuration.
Implemented SEO fundamentals such as keyword structuring, metadata optimization, and search engine indexing to establish initial online presence.
Designed and managed lead acquisition workflows for capturing and processing user inquiries.
Developed and deployed n8n-based automation pipelines for lead routing, follow-ups, and coordination with on-ground consultation teams.
Led early-stage hiring by sourcing, evaluating, and onboarding candidates through LinkedIn for operational roles.
Collaborated on structuring service offerings including career guidance, banking jobs and study abroad support.

education.institution: University of Delhi - Faculty of Technology

education.area: Minor Degree in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
